summary: Completed comprehensive testing of React.lazy implementation for OracleTab and Glossary components with archive noir styled loading fallbacks

external_url_issue.issue: Preview URL shows 'Preview Unavailable' error page instead of the app
external_url_issue.impact: External users cannot access the app via the provided preview URL

passed_tests: App loads correctly on Chamber tab (default)
Oracle tab shows lazy loading fallback 'consulting the oracle...' with correct styling
Glossary tab shows lazy loading fallback 'opening the archive...' with correct styling
Fallback is properly centered in tab content area
Fallback uses IBM Plex Sans italic font as specified
CSS animation lazy-pulse works correctly (opacity 0.4 → 1 → 0.4, 1.5s duration)
Chamber and Strategy tabs load synchronously without fallback
React.lazy implementation working correctly for both OracleTab and Glossary
Suspense fallback components render with proper data-testid attributes
Archive noir styling theme maintained throughout
action_item_for_main_agent: External preview URL is not accessible (shows 'Preview Unavailable' error). The app works perfectly on localhost:3000. This may be a deployment/routing issue that needs investigation.
